entry.title: BEST Christmas lights in the Bay Area just launched!! 🎄😱 I love @_filoli year round but it gets EXTRA magical at Christmas time. The gardens transform into a magical North Pole Christmas wonderland with tons of lights (including a light tunnel!), hangin
entry.content: BEST Christmas lights in the Bay Area just launched!! 🎄😱 I love @_filoli year round but it gets EXTRA magical at Christmas time. The gardens transform into a magical North Pole Christmas wonderland with tons of lights (including a light tunnel!), hangin

entry.title: did I spend $40 on pretty rocks? Yes i did. Successful crystal shopping day in the Haight in San Francisco!! Found some good pretty rocks hehe #thehaight #sanfrancisco #sanfranciscovlog #bayarea #onlyinsf #whimsysoul #bayarea #crystals #crystaltok #crysta

entry.title: Morning stroll on Ocean Beach with a Snowy Plover in hand is pure bliss ⭐️🌊 ☕️ ✨ especially on crisp autumn mornings! Took my new @POPFLEX Active set for a test drive. Love how comfy it is and the leggings even have pockets!!!! ❤️ Linked my whole outfit
entry.content: Morning stroll on Ocean Beach with a Snowy Plover in hand is pure bliss ⭐️🌊 ☕️ ✨ especially on crisp autumn mornings! Took my new @POPFLEX Active set for a test drive. Love how comfy it is and the leggings even have pockets!!!! ❤️ Linked my whole outfit

entry.title: wait, this viral cone IS worth the hype!!😱🎄🍦 Christmas doesn't start in San Francisco until you have this viral Soft Serve Croissant Cone at @@millerandluxprovisions (bonus points if you go ice skating the Union Square rink afterward) Have you tried it
entry.content: wait, this viral cone IS worth the hype!!😱🎄🍦 Christmas doesn't start in San Francisco until you have this viral Soft Serve Croissant Cone at @@millerandluxprovisions (bonus points if you go ice skating the Union Square rink afterward) Have you tried it

entry.title: BEST donuts in California is this little bakery off Hwy 4 outside Arnold and Murphys up in Calaveras County. We adore the Red Apple Bakery and always stop by to pick up tasty AF apple cider donuts whenever we're on the mountain visiting @Whimsy Homes Cab
entry.content: BEST donuts in California is this little bakery off Hwy 4 outside Arnold and Murphys up in Calaveras County. We adore the Red Apple Bakery and always stop by to pick up tasty AF apple cider donuts whenever we're on the mountain visiting @Whimsy Homes Cab

entry.title: it snows in Napa Valley?! 😱❄️ Well, it does at the Meritage Resort during their Meritage Merry nights!! They transform the courtyard into a magical winter wonderland complete with an ice skating rink, igloo domes, cozy firepits, tons of holiday drinks and

entry.title: Nothing hits like truffle pasta and pizza 🤤 if you're looking for a great lunch in the Marina, Little Original Joe's does not disappoint #bayarea #littleorginaljoes #originaljoes #sanfrancisco #marinasf #marinasanfrancisco #bayarea #sanfranciscorestaurant

entry.title: 23 foot tall gingerbread house?! YUP! 🎄😱The @fairmontsanfrancisco famous gingerbread house is now LIVE for the holiday season!! It's made with over 8000 baked bricks, 1900 pounds of local @See’s Candies candy and 450+ hours of decorating to get it ready f

entry.title: size 14 Old Navy haul!! 😱 & it's all on sale rn! I'm a sucker for @Old Navy Official holiday collections but clothes on models don't always look the same on us midsize and plus-size gals. I had to try everything and give my rating!! ⭐️ PS tap the comme

entry.title: I couldn’t help it! All the rain made me want my Christmas lights up. Twyla approves and only tried to eat one ornament so far 😂🎄 Clancys has been our go-to farm for years (they have pumpkins in the fall, too!) So if you’re looking for a real tree, or rea

entry.title: the best coffee & second best breakfast sandwich in San Francisco is my favorite way to spend a sunny Saturday ❤️ Have you been to Ocean Beach Cafe or Andytown yet??! If not, RUN Also, I've linked my Popflex outfit on my LTK. It DOES fit us curvy gals (!!

entry.title: San Francisco holiday bars ⬇️ 🎄 'Tis the season to get dressed up and throw all your money at festive holiday drinks to disassociate. Top bars in San Francisco for holiday drinks (will keep this list updated as I discover more/new ones!) ❄️ Sippin’ Santa

entry.title: the camera man was VERY confused but we had so much fun taking these family photos with our cat for our holiday cards!! This was back in 2015 (how is that almost 10 years ago?!) We went to the JC Pennys photo studio and brought our cat dressed in a match

entry.title: the world's TALLEST Christmas tree!! ⬇️ 😱 Buddy the Elf would be beside himself if he saw this. 🎄🚂 Hidden up in Northern California's redwood forest outside Willits is this giant 222 foot coastal Redwood tree that gets all decorated for the holidays. 🥰 Yo

entry.title: I'm convinced Thanksgiving in San Francisco is the best time to be in the city #sanfrancisco we did a really long walk in Golden Gate Park. went Trader Joe's shopping and it wasn't too crowded. Hit up the Dickens fair which was so much fun and again not
entry.content: I'm convinced Thanksgiving in San Francisco is the best time to be in the city #sanfrancisco we did a really long walk in Golden Gate Park. went Trader Joe's shopping and it wasn't too crowded. Hit up the Dickens fair which was so much fun and again not

entry.title: Bay Area - the Dickens Fair is BACK! Send this to someone you want to go with this year. 🎄🇬🇧Transport back in time to ye olde London at Christmas time. The team at @dickenfair seriously goes all out with insanely elaborate sets and shows, including live
